props.title: The Twelfth Category Nobody Drew on the Map

props.text: The biggest AI agent landscape map — 120+ tools across 11 categories — has zero simulation tools. But a parallel ecosystem of social simulation platforms (OASIS, AgentSociety, Concordia, PolicySim, MiroShark, and 30+ others) has quietly grown into a serious field that nobody mapping 'AI agents' has noticed. This article maps where MiroShark sits in that invisible 12th category and why execution-focused landscape maps are about to need a new section.
